html:
Exclusive to:  

The Bucket-o-poop is a craftable item from the Reign of Giants and Shipwrecked DLC. It is crafted using 4 Logs, 2 Bone Shards, and 3 Manure. It is used to maximize the uses of Manure as fertilizer. It has ten uses; each use decreases its durability by 10%. Despite Manure being able to be used as fuel, the Bucket-o-poop is unable to fuel fires; however, it can still extinguish smoldering objects.

Trivia

  • The Bucket-o-poop utilizes previously unused game textures of a Bucket.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

The Bucket-o-poop is a craftable item from the Reign of Giants and Shipwrecked DLC. It is crafted using 4 Logs, 2 Bone Shards, and 3 Manure. It is used to maximize the uses of Manure as fertilizer. It has ten uses; each use decreases its durability by 10%. Despite Manure being able to be used as fuel, the Bucket-o-poop is unable to fuel fires; however, it can still extinguish smoldering objects.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Xô-o-poop là một vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được từ DLC Reign of Giants và Shipwrecked. Nó được chế tạo bằng cách sử dụng 4 Gỗ , 2 Mảnh Xương và 3 Phân . Nó được sử dụng để tối đa hóa việc sử dụng phân bón làm phân bón. Nó có mười công dụng; mỗi lần sử dụng sẽ giảm độ bền của nó đi 10%. Mặc dù Phân có thể được sử dụng làm nhiên liệu nhưng Bucket-o-poop không thể tạo ra lửa; tuy nhiên, nó vẫn có thể dập tắt những vật đang cháy âm ỉ.

The '''Bucket-o-poop''' is a craftable [[item]] from the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' and ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is crafted using 4 [[Log]]s, 2 [[Bone Shards]], and 3 [[Manure]]. It is used to maximize the uses of Manure as [[Farming#Fertilizers|fertilizer]]. It has ten uses; each use decreases its durability by 10%. Despite Manure being able to be used as fuel, the Bucket-o-poop is unable to fuel fires; however, it can still extinguish smoldering objects.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Bucket-o-poop utilizes previously unused game textures of a [[Unimplemented Features#Unimplemented Items|Bucket]].
